But it was like obviously there, it was a part of their lives. The remarriage, I've had that coming out of the woodwork. You'd be surprised how many people just in our little circle of influence have remarried an ex-wife. It's apparently like common. And so I get mail and I get people coming up and telling me their remarriage story. And so that's a way to know that you're like doing this right. If all they're talking to you about is the mechanics of what you teach, you won't keep them long for one thing because you can do all the mechanics in about 12 months and then you've taught them everything about whatever the hell it is that you teach them. So you won't keep them long and you really won't have them involved with you. Second, when people start telling your stories to others, preferably giving you credit, that tells you a lot. That says you're getting it right. When you get personal fan mail, as I said. And so like I grabbed Thanksgiving, so I don't know, I got a pile like this of cards and notes and stuff from people. Some of whom are sort of the usual suspects. But many are people I don't know from Adam's house cat. And this is their first now personal communication with Dan. And by the way, it's really important to validate that. And so they all get personal communication back, which is sometimes nothing more than on the back of the card and it gets sent back to them. Other times when they've done this, the long painful, it warrants more than a scribble on the back of the card and it's got to be done. But the key words here is, the key words for us are of course, I can't wait to meet you at the super conference. Which, ah, $1800, okay? It gets a long note, right? But I mean, so this is a guy who has poured out a bunch of personal stuff as well as a bunch of business stuff. And what I get a lot incorporated in here, because I see it in what I do, is they're looking for approval from dad. And so they tell me everything they bought. I've done this and I've done that and I've done this and I've done that. And so since that's exactly what I want them to do, that tells me I'm getting that right. Because they have understood consciously or unconsciously that that's important and that's a path to a path on the head, which means I'm showing the path right, because they got it. And so I got that guy's long story. This guy, a lot of people write to me about their kids. That's another thing, when they're telling you family stories. So this is a little note about their, heard my son Bobby tell his two week old daughter it's okay to make money. And he started reading your books. So now she's going to get a note and she'll get something to give to her son Bobby. This one, I guess I didn't bring it. I had a big long one. Oh yeah, here's somebody who's taken all the trouble. I'm a member of GKIC and I've been loaning your newsletter immediately. But no, it's okay. To a very small friend of mine, I thought you'd like to hear about the results he's gotten from using your marketing methods. And this person, by the way, I think she's in the same town as Nielsen. Where's Nielsen? Oh no, this is Waterford, ME. What's ME in abbreviation? Okay, close. So she has taken the time to write a two page S-Mouse letter telling me about actually the results of the marketing used to raise money for her church. So she spent a lot of time on this. So really why has she done that? Well, because she's seen the mouse letter thing one or more times in the stuff that we show them and she is determined that that might be a way to get approval from ME and has, God knows, she may have spent hours on this. So now she's got to get something cute back or she won't be happy. But it tells you that you're getting it right when you get this kind of mail. And I will tell you if you're not getting this kind of mail, you aren't getting it right because you should be getting this from a reasonable percentage, two, three, four, five, that 10% of your customer base should be communicating with you on this level. Now there are some who rise, of course, to the level of pest who think they have a pen pal and your positioning needs to discourage that a little and eventually they start getting ignored or getting form letters because it's impossible to deal with them. The first timers are the most significant to me because that shows movement on their part that we want to encourage. And so the fifth thing is that they are seeking your approval. You know you're getting this right when they are bringing you their papers and they want you to put it up on the refrigerator door with a magnet. When you know you have enormous influence over them because that means they will do pretty much whatever is necessary to get approval from you. And so there's a certain amount, for example, of purchase activity that occurs if I step to the stage in front of our group or if I otherwise ask people to buy something, there's no thought on their part about do they want this thing or not want it or need it or not need it. They buy it because they want approval. And so it's a very useful thing to have. The first sign that you're getting it is when they're bringing you what they have colored and they want to see it up on their refrigerator door. And so if that's not happening, you know you don't have this right. It also makes doing the news a lot easier, by the way, when you get a lot of exhibits and you get a lot of stuff sent to you. I always have far more to choose from than I can use because tons of this comes in. Some people very elaborate, by the way. That's sort of another thing is if they're sending you objects and gifts, if they're sending you stuff, if they're being clever in the way that they communicate with you. I mean, I got three weeks ago I got a saddle. Now the person didn't quite get it because I don't ride. But that's okay. But I mean I got a saddle in a box with a letter. And the letter is, I just sent you this because I'm going to be doing big things in the future and I want you to remember my name. I've of course forgotten his name but I have it on file. But I got a saddle. Well, that kind of stuff happens a lot. And if it's not happening, then you know you don't have this right. Knowledge all that stuff? Yes. And again, it's for anything from a quick scribbled note, like I have these pre-done thanks a million little things, or I may use their piece. And I try and get away with as much of that as I can because the volume is significant and it's a growing, it's not diminishing. And so now it's not like timely for the most part. But it happens. Now most interestingly, not only do they have to think you care about them, they have to wind up caring about you. And so kind of another way to know you're getting this right is when you're verbally or by mail or email or whatever, you are getting people trying to help you.
